title: You Shou Yan
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: The Heroes of Galaxy Wars
synopsis: Rai is a space opera that fuses feudal Chinese and Japanese customs with vast galaxy spanning empires and space-going societies. The story follows the life and times of the samurai Rai, and the quest of several spacefaring factions for control of territory and, of course, the Empire.

title: Anta to Osananajimitte dake demo Iyananoni!: Zekkou kara Hajimaru S-kyuu Bishoujo to no Gakuen Nariagari Seikatsu
titleRomaji: Anta to Osananajimitte dake demo Iyananoni!: Zekkou kara Hajimaru S-kyuu Bishoujo to no Gakuen Nariagari Seikatsu
titleNative: アンタと幼なじみってだけでもイヤなのに！～絶交から始まるS級美少女との学園成り上がり生活～
synonyms: S-kyuu Gakuen no Jishou "Futsuu", Kawaisugiru Kanojotachi ni Guigui Kitararete Barebare desu.
S級学園の自称「普通」、可愛すぎる彼女たちにグイグイ来られてバレバレです。
I Hate That We're Childhood Friends!: My Rise to the Top of School Life with an S-Rank Beauty Begins After a Falling Out
synopsis: Kazuma Suzuki was just your average high schooler—until his childhood friend, Rua Takayashiki, a beautiful, sharp-tongued girl who also happened to be the granddaughter of the school chairman and the nation’s top idol, cut all ties with him using a line straight out of a drama. Forced into submission for years as her so-called childhood friend, Kazuma decides it’s finally time for his first-ever rebellion. He’s done playing lapdog. This time, he’s taking back his freedom—and aiming for a normal school life. Escaping a powerful beauty like her is easier said than done... (Source: Square Enix)

title: The Knight in the Area
synopsis: Believing himself to be useless at football, Aizawa Kakeru opts to become the manager of his school's football team, while his brother Suguru is its ace, and is even good enough to represent Japan. However, Kakeru may be harbouring a strong talent within himself that only Suguru can see, and the two often get into arguments over Kakeru's denial of his skills. Things are made more complicated with the return of Nana, an old playmate of theirs that Kakeru has a crush on. Join the brothers in their journey to the national and even international championships! Story written under the penname Igano, Hiroaki.

title: Break New World
titleNative: ブレイクニューワールド
synopsis: In a world where people are ranked by their trustworthiness, a young boy named Kiriya, who has had everything stolen from him by his rulers, embarks on a rebellion that will turn the world upside down. A forbidden sci-fi suspense story begins here. (Cycomi, Translated)

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Mujin
synopsis: Lee Seon-Ho was falsely accused of parricide crime for murdering his own father. He lived through each day without being able to die. One day, Seon-Ho was approached by a mysterious old man and offered a desired deal that he could never refuse… (Source: Naver, translated)

synopsis: "May I never be born again." Trying to throw himself off the roof of the school is Ayumu, a boy who lived an ordinary junior high school life until half a year ago. What pushed him to this point? And what is the true ending that awaits...?

title: Zoufu no Hanataba
synopsis: The story begins when middle schooler Ryuunosuke visits his grandmother's house on an island. As Ryuunosuke walks past the stairs leading to the second floor, a strange, plant-like thing extends down from above. Intrigued, Ryuunosuke tries to climb the stairs, but his uncle stops him with an uncharacteristically grim facial expression, saying, “What are you doing?” and “You'd better not go up there.” That night, however, Ryuunosuke's curiosity drives him to go upstairs after all... (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.

title: Chie Aru Koibito
synopsis: The protagonists of "Chie Aru Koibito," Ushidome-kun and Shirakaba-san, are both intelligent class representatives who judge things rationally. Even though their classmates extol the two as a perfect match, Shirakaba-san declares that she "doesn't have even a second to lose herself in love." Ushidome-kun is honestly shocked by this, but he also appeals that he is "not in a state to fall in love," which upsets Shirakaba-san. They are both too conscious of each other, and the rationality of the two explosive people is on the verge of collapse. This is the love story of a male and female honor student who cannot be honest with each other and are tormented by their own worldly desires. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Yotaka Futatabi
synopsis: That woman is "Yotaka." Once famous in the underworld as the strongest assassin, she is now a 33-year-old (and very unlucky) drug addict and alcoholic. She's enjoying her unemployed life in a rundown apartment. ♪ With her mind and body completely slack, Yotaka receives an invitation from her assassin friend, "Kohai," to return to active duty...!! Will she return to the battlefield once again?! Yotaka!!! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Wakaba-san Chi no Aoi Koi
synopsis: The four sisters of the Wakaba family are all in the midst of their “first love” right now. The eldest sister, Kokoharu, is in love with a senior at her part-time job. The second sister, Manatsu, likes a guy in the Archery Club. The third sister, Akira, is interested in a club-mate the same age as her. The youngest, Chifuyu, likes a boy in her class. The four sisters, who are close friends, obsess over their love problems day and night. How do you tell someone you love him! (Source: Sunday Webry, translated)

title: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleRomaji: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleNative: バンドをクビにされた僕と推しJKの青春リライト
synopsis: Just before their major debut, 26-year-old Shibakusa Tooru is fired by his bandmates. In the midst of his despair, he learns that his former classmate and favorite artist, Narahara Shigure, has committed suicide. With nowhere to turn, Tooru jumps off the balcony to follow her...or so he thought, but he suddenly finds himself transported back in time to his high school days. In order to change his terrible future, he must start over with his favorite high school girl in this school youth revenge story! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: School for Wizards Old Enough to Learn Magic
titleEnglish: School for Wizards Old Enough to Learn Magic
synopsis: Roy Aveillam, the arrogant son of a notorious duke, is widely feared. But one heated clash with a rival classmate jolt something deep within –his memory of a past life returns, as does a burning desire: to master a craft and become someone extraordinary. Reincarnated at just eight years old, Roy awakens to the world's latent magic and vows to redefine himself –not just by his lineage, but by his will. (Source: Titan Manga)
